system.powerDescription:
You seize control of all electronic devices within CAT range around yourself. For the duration of this power you may do the following: 

• Stop or start the flow of electricity to any device. 

• Display any image you can picture on electronic screens. 

• Interact with the device from range as if you were operating it normally. 

You do not gain increased knowledge of the device that a normal user would not have. Gain or grant +1D when you next take advantage of this power and it may easily alter the parameters of a roll whilst active.
